title: Don’t pick the wrong privacy battle: Aadhaar held in a Google Wallet shouldn’t make anyone nervous
description: For privacy, an Aadhaar held in a digital wallet is safer than handing over a photocopy of one’s ID card. In fact, we should open up the system further. If one’s age is all a platform needs to check, for example, there’s a way to ensure that’s the only part disclosed.
